seo.title: Coco Maya | Rooftop Restaurant & Daily Brunch in Little Italy San Diego
seo.description: Modern American coastal cuisine, craft cocktails, and San Diego best brunch, served daily. Coco Maya by Miss Bs in Little Italy at {{street}}, San Diego CA.

hero.title: Coco Maya
hero.titleSuffix: Rooftop Restaurant & Bar in Little Italy, San Diego
hero.body: Modern American coastal cuisine, craft cocktails, and San Diego's best brunch. {{openDailyLower}} in the heart of Little Italy.
hero.imageAlt: Coco Maya rooftop glass atrium bar — restaurant in Little Italy San Diego

brand.eyebrow: Rooftop Restaurant · Little Italy San Diego
brand.body1: Coco Maya brings elevated modern American coastal cuisine to the heart of San Diego's Little Italy. An open-air glass atrium, a stunning teal bar, and a menu that takes both the food and the cocktails seriously.
brand.body2Template: An elevated rooftop patio, daily brunch, and private dining that transforms any occasion. {{street}} — right in the middle of everything.
brand.imageAlt: Coco Maya rooftop patio and glass atrium bar — Little Italy San Diego restaurant

cocktails.title: Craft Cocktails & Rooftop Bar in Little Italy San Diego
cocktails.subtitle: Craft cocktails built for the elevated patio.
cocktails.imageAltTemplate: {{name}} cocktail at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

brunch.title: Daily Brunch in Little Italy San Diego
brunch.body: San Diego's best brunch on the elevated patio. Modern coastal plates and craft cocktails every day of the week.
brunch.imageAlt: Daily brunch at Coco Maya — best brunch in Little Italy San Diego

food.body: Modern American coastal cuisine built around fresh ingredients, bold flavors, and plates worth photographing. From prime ribeye to fresh tacos.
food.imageAltTemplate: {{name}} at Coco Maya San Diego Little Italy

privateEvents.body: Birthdays, bachelorette parties, rehearsal dinners, corporate events. Coco Maya provides a private event space in San Diego that your guests will actually talk about.
privateEvents.imageAlt: Private event venue in Little Italy San Diego — Coco Maya rooftop dining

rooftopBar.title: Rooftop Patio & Bar
rooftopBar.subtitle: Craft cocktails and an open-air glass atrium bar — one of Little Italy's most distinctive rooftop settings, every day of the week.
rooftopBar.cocktailImageAlt: Coco Maya signature cocktails on the rooftop patio
